metadata.title: Digital Ibimina — Your savings group, on your phone
metadata.description: Track contributions, loans, and share-outs — without the paper notebook.

common.unknownError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

landing.heroSubtitle: Track contributions, loans, and share-outs — without the paper notebook. Built for how Rwandan savings groups actually work.
landing.step1Detail: Set the group name, weekly contribution, and meeting day.
landing.step2Detail: At every meeting, the secretary logs contributions and loans in seconds.
landing.step3Detail: At the end of the cycle, everyone gets their share, calculated correctly.
landing.whyUsTitle: Built the way savings groups actually work
landing.whyUsIntro: Digital Ibimina replaces the paper notebook with something every member can trust — on the phone they already carry.
landing.why2Subtitle: Every contribution is confirmed by text
landing.why3Subtitle: Everyone sees their own balance, anytime
landing.why4Subtitle: Your group's history, always backed up
landing.testimonialQuote: We used to rely on a notebook — now every member can check their own balance on their phone, anytime.
landing.closingTitle: Your group is waiting for you
landing.closingSubtitle: Start in less than two minutes.

auth.registerSubtitle: Use your phone number and a 5-digit PIN.
auth.loginSubtitle: Use your phone number and PIN.
auth.visualHeadline: Your savings group, on your phone.
auth.visualSubtitle: Track contributions, loans, and share-outs — without the paper notebook.
